// 01 — About

Building Data Infrastructure
That Scales.

I'm Somasundaram M, a Data Engineer based in Chennai with 4+ years of hands-on experience building scalable data pipelines for investment banking — a domain where reliability, accuracy, and performance are non-negotiable.

My core work spans the full lifecycle of data: from ingesting raw trade and settlement data through AWS EMR & PySpark, to orchestrating complex workflows with Apache Airflow, and delivering insights via Amazon Redshift and Snowflake.

I thrive on solving high-volume data challenges — whether that's reconciling 5M+ daily records, migrating years of historical trades, or tuning Spark jobs for peak performance.

// 03 — Experience
Secova Solutions
Data Engineer
Aug 2021 — Present
Batch Processing Framework for Daily Trade Reconciliation using PySpark on EMR
  • Designed & implemented a batch processing framework on AWS EMR using PySpark to reconcile daily trade and settlement data (~5M+ records/day) from multiple banking source systems.
  • Built scalable ETL pipelines to ingest raw trade files into AWS S3 data lake in Parquet format with a partition strategy (trade date, asset class) improving query performance.
  • Implemented reconciliation logic using PySpark DataFrame API & Spark SQL to compare trade, position, and ledger datasets for accuracy.
  • Integrated Amazon Redshift for downstream analytics — optimized distribution keys, sort keys, and SQL views for reconciliation reports.
  • Orchestrated end-to-end batch workflows using Apache Airflow DAGs with dependency management, scheduling, retries, and monitoring.
  • Optimized Spark performance through partitioning, caching, and resource tuning on EMR for high-volume investment banking data.
Historical Trade Data Migration to S3 Parquet Format
  • Led a large-scale migration of 5+ years of historical trade data from legacy Oracle and file-based systems to an AWS S3 data lake with 100% record-level reconciliation.
  • Built migration utilities in Python & PySpark on EMR with format standardization and schema evolution handling.
  • Designed partition strategy by trade date, asset class, and region to enable efficient pruning for analytics workloads.
  • Established metadata registration in AWS Glue Data Catalog and applied IAM & Lake Formation policies to secure sensitive data.
  • Automated migration batches and dependency flows using Apache Airflow for controlled backfill and restartability.
// 04 — Projects
01

Trade Reconciliation Pipeline

Batch data processing framework reconciling 5M+ daily trade records from multiple banking source systems using PySpark on EMR. Achieved full accuracy between trade, position, and ledger datasets.

PySpark AWS EMR S3 Redshift Airflow
02

Historical Data Lake Migration

End-to-end migration of 5+ years of investment banking trade data from legacy Oracle systems to AWS S3 in Parquet format. 100% reconciliation accuracy across all records with automated backfill workflows.

Python PySpark AWS Glue Lake Formation Airflow
03

Snowflake Data Warehouse Integration

Designed and implemented Snowflake warehouse schema aligned with downstream reporting requirements from migrated S3 data lake. Schema mapping, data profiling, and performance optimization.

Snowflake SQL AWS S3 Data Modeling
04

Airflow Orchestration Framework

Built reusable Apache Airflow DAG templates for complex ETL workflows with dependency management, automated retries, SLA monitoring, and operational visibility for investment banking pipelines.

Apache Airflow Python AWS CloudWatch
